title: Entity Ocelotattack Behavior
description: Controls specific attack behavior for Ocelots.

max_distance.title: Max Distance
max_distance.description: Max distance from the target, this entity will use this attack behavior.

max_sneak_range.title: Max Sneak Range
max_sneak_range.description: Max distance from the target, this entity starts sneaking.

max_sprint_range.title: Max Sprint Range
max_sprint_range.description: Max distance from the target, this entity starts sprinting (sprinting takes priority over sneaking).

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

reach_multiplier.title: Reach Multiplier
reach_multiplier.description: Used with the base size of the entity to determine minimum target-distance before trying to deal attack damage.

sneak_speed_multiplier.title: Sneak Speed Multiplier
sneak_speed_multiplier.description: Modifies the attacking entity's movement speed while sneaking.

sprint_speed_multiplier.title: Sprint Speed Multiplier
sprint_speed_multiplier.description: Modifies the attacking entity's movement speed while sprinting.

walk_speed_multiplier.title: Walk Speed Multiplier
walk_speed_multiplier.description: Modifies the attacking entity's movement speed when not sneaking or sprinting, but still within attack range.

x_max_rotation.title: x Max Rotation
x_max_rotation.description: Maximum rotation (in degrees), on the X-axis, this entity can rotate while trying to look at the target.

y_max_head_rotation.title: y Max Head Rotation
y_max_head_rotation.description: Maximum rotation (in degrees), on the Y-axis, this entity's head can rotate while trying to look at the target.
